messages.content: What is the Wade-Giles spelling of Guangzhou?
The Wade-Giles spelling of Guangzhou is "Kuangchow."
"Nanjing"
The Wade-Giles spelling of Nanjing is "Nanking."
"Beijing"
The Wade-Giles spelling of Beijing is "Pei-ching."
"Xi'an"
The Wade-Giles spelling of Xi'an is "Hsi-an."
"Xi Jinping"
The Wade-Giles spelling of "Xi Jinping" is "Hsi Ching-p'ing."
What are the romanization systems used for Korean?
The two main romanization systems used for Korean are the McCune-Reischauer system and the Revised Romanization of Korean (RR).
How is "Seoul" spelled out in both McCune-Reischauer and the Revised Romanization of Korean?

In the McCune-Reischauer system, "Seoul" is spelled as "Sŏul."
In the Revised Romanization of Korean (RR), "Seoul" is spelled as "Seoul."
How is "Liu Bu" spelled in Wade-Giles?
In Wade-Giles, "Liu Bu" is spelled as "Liu Pu."
How about in Pinyin?
In Pinyin, "Liu Bu" is spelled as "Liú Bù."
How is "Cao Cao" spelled in Wade-Giles?
In Wade-Giles, "Cao Cao" is spelled as "Ts'ao Ts'ao."
How is Chung Lee spelled in Wade-Giles?
In Wade-Giles, "Chung Lee" is spelled as "Chung Li."
What about Pinyin?
In Pinyin, "Chung Lee" is spelled as "Zhong Li."
How is "Deng Xiaoping" spelled in Cantonese?
In Cantonese, "Deng Xiaoping" is commonly spelled as 鄧小平.
How is "鄧小平" spelled in Wade-Giles?
In Wade-Giles, "鄧小平" is spelled as "Teng Hsiao-p'ing".
